description.overview: Rhodesian Ridgebacks are dignified, athletic dogs known for the distinctive ridge of hair along their backs. They were bred to hunt lions in Africa.
description.temperament: Ridgebacks are loyal, dignified, and protective. They're reserved with strangers but devoted to family. Need confident handling.
description.health: Generally healthy. Watch for hip/elbow dysplasia, dermoid sinus, and thyroid issues.
description.exercise: High exercise needs. Need daily vigorous activity. Athletic and enjoy running.

not_for: Those wanting a very social dog
verdict.summary: Dignified, loyal athletes that need experienced handling. Ridgebacks are devoted to family but reserved with strangers. Best for confident owners who can provide leadership and exercise.
